overall_justification: While the newspaper reports on the Convênio de Taubaté and its proposal for a Caixa de Conversão, it frames the discussion around concerns about "quebra do padrão" (breaking the gold standard) and potential artificial elevation of exchange rates. The article highlights the anxieties around maintaining "probidade do paiz" (financial integrity of the country), a key concern of the Orthodox perspective.  Although it acknowledges the Convênio's aim to address financial difficulties, the emphasis on potential negative consequences of manipulating the exchange rate suggests a cautious, Orthodox-leaning stance.

supporting_evidence.quote: ...publica uma carta minto interessante sobre a chorada «quebra do padrão.., que se pretende ter sido resolvida no convênio...
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Highlights the concern with maintaining the gold standard, a core tenet of the Orthodox position.

supporting_evidence.quote: ...o unico remédio para o nosso péssimo estado financeiro", resultante dos empréstimos e da consequente e artificial elevação do cambio.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Expresses skepticism about artificial manipulation of the exchange rate, aligning with Orthodox fears of inflation.

supporting_evidence.quote: Os 15 milhões esterlinos do empréstimo serão applicados como lastro para a caixa de emissão para a fixação do valor da moeda.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: While mentioning the proposed use of the loan, the focus remains on "fixação do valor da moeda," suggesting a preoccupation with stability favored by the Orthodox view.
